textPlain: Flagged for containing spoilers for us who are enjoying the new Dune movies for a few internet points.

Dune has been around since 1965.
This has been flagged incorrectly. You can’t seriously expect “spoilers” to not happen for a work that is 60 years old.

The books and previous movies/shows have been out for 60 years, 40 years, and 20 years. I don't think it's fair to complain about spoilers. Should we also refrain from mentioning that Darth Vader's surname is Skywalker?

If you're that concerned about spoilers, maybe just don't click on anything related to the media you're so concerned about being spoiled for you?It's a "you" problem with a "you" solution. No one owes you or anyone else this consideration. There's always someone who hasn't seen something. Taking "no spoilers!" to its extreme would prevent ever discussing the content of media at all.
I'm not taking it too seriously but damn i was caught off guard by the first sentence heavy spoiler.
